biography: Joshua Max Brener is an American actor. He played the roles of Kyle on the IFC series "Maron" and Nelson Big Head Bighetti on the HBO series "Silicon Valley". In animation, he provides the voices of Donatello on "Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles", Neeku Vozo on "Star Wars Resistance" and Dylan Dalmatian on "101 Dalmatian Street."
name: Josh Brener
